requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Battery and ESS Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62619 / IEC 62933电池与储能系统证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62619 / IEC 62933電池與儲能系統證據

summary.en: Kenya does not appear to provide one universal public BESS product certificate separate from KEBS import conformity. In practice, IEC 62619 safety evidence for industrial lithium cells and batteries and IEC 62933 electrical energy storage system evidence may be requested through the Kenya standard / approved specification used for PVoC, project-owner specifications, grid review, insurer review, or lender due diligence.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚似乎没有独立于KEBS进口符合性之外的单一公开BESS产品证书。实践中，工业用锂电芯和电池的IEC 62619安全证据以及IEC 62933电力储能系统证据，可能通过PVoC采用的肯尼亚标准/认可规范、项目业主规范、并网审查、保险方审查或融资尽调被要求。
summary.zht: 肯亞似乎沒有獨立於KEBS進口符合性之外的單一公開BESS產品證書。實務中，工業用鋰電芯和電池的IEC 62619安全證據以及IEC 62933電力儲能系統證據，可能透過PVoC採用的肯亞標準／認可規範、項目業主規範、併網審查、保險方審查或融資盡調被要求。

standards_or_laws: Applicable Kenya standard or approved specification selected for PVoC / project review

summary.en: China BESS files often include GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports. These may overlap technically with IEC battery-safety topics, but the Kenyan reviewer may still require IEC-numbered reports, English documentation, accredited-lab evidence, or a KEBS / PVoC agent acceptance decision.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件通常包含GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023报告。这些内容可能与IEC电池安全主题存在技术重叠，但肯尼亚审查方仍可能要求IEC编号报告、英文文件、认可实验室证据或KEBS/PVoC机构接受结论。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件通常包含GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023報告。這些內容可能與IEC電池安全主題存在技術重疊，但肯亞審查方仍可能要求IEC編號報告、英文文件、認可實驗室證據或KEBS／PVoC機構接受結論。

gap.en: Build a clause matrix from China GB / GB/T reports to IEC 62619 and relevant IEC 62933 parts. Mark which evidence is a formal IEC test report, which is only technically equivalent, and which items require Kenya-side acceptance by KEBS, a PVoC agent, utility, project owner, insurer, or lender.
gap.zh: 应建立从中国GB/GB/T报告到IEC 62619及相关IEC 62933部分的条款矩阵。清楚标注哪些证据是正式IEC检测报告，哪些仅属技术等效，以及哪些项目需要KEBS、PVoC机构、公用事业单位、项目业主、保险方或贷款方在肯尼亚侧接受。
gap.zht: 應建立從中國GB／GB/T報告到IEC 62619及相關IEC 62933部分的條款矩陣。清楚標註哪些證據是正式IEC檢測報告，哪些僅屬技術等效，以及哪些項目需要KEBS、PVoC機構、公用事業單位、項目業主、保險方或貸款方在肯亞側接受。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific or mandatory only when incorporated by a Kenya standard, approved specification, PVoC route, utility, permit, insurer, lender, or contract
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended standards unless incorporated by regulation or contract

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence is useful and may be required by the Kenya route, but China GB reports should be crosswalked and accepted explicitly rather than assumed equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据有用，且可能被肯尼亚路径要求；但中国GB报告应逐项映射并取得明确接受，而非假定等效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據有用，且可能被肯亞路徑要求；但中國GB報告應逐項映射並取得明確接受，而非假定等效。
